cookie_banner.title: We use cookies
cookie_banner.description_pre: We use necessary cookies for the site to work and, only with your consent, analytics and marketing cookies. You can change your decision at any time from
cookie_banner.description_mid: in the footer. More info in our
cookie_banner.necessary_desc: Essential for the site to work (e.g. keeping you signed in). Cannot be disabled.
cookie_banner.analytics_desc: Help us understand how the site is used so we can improve it. None are active today. They would only be enabled if you accept this category.
cookie_banner.marketing_desc: Used to measure and personalize advertising campaigns. None are active today. They would only be enabled if you accept this category.

cookie_policy_page.title: Cookie Policy
cookie_policy_page.what_body: Cookies are small text files that a website stores in your browser. They are used to remember information about your visit, such as your session or your preferences, and in some cases to analyze site usage or show relevant advertising.
cookie_policy_page.row_session_purpose: Keeps you securely signed in (httpOnly, not accessible from JavaScript).
cookie_policy_page.row_consent_purpose: Stores your cookie choice so we don't ask again on every visit.
cookie_policy_page.row_analytics_purpose: Google Analytics 4 measures visits and site usage in aggregate (page views, traffic source) to help us improve it. Only loads if you accept this cookie category.
cookie_policy_page.row_marketing_purpose: No marketing cookie is active yet. If advertising or remarketing is added in the future, it will appear here before being enabled, and will only load if you accept it.
cookie_policy_page.legal_body_1: Necessary cookies are always installed because the site cannot work without them (legitimate interest / performance of the service you request). Analytics and marketing cookies are only installed if you give your explicit consent, in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable cookie regulations.
cookie_policy_page.legal_body_2: You can withdraw your consent at any time, as easily as you gave it.
cookie_policy_page.browser_body: You can also block or delete cookies from your browser settings. Note that blocking necessary cookies may prevent some parts of the site (such as your student area) from working correctly.

privacy_policy_page.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy_page.controller_body: UCLCampus (trading name). Legal entity details, registered address, and tax ID pending completion by the project owner before going live. Contact: info@uclcampus.com.
privacy_policy_page.data_intro: Depending on how you interact with us, we may collect:
privacy_policy_page.data_identification: Identification data: full name, email, phone number.
privacy_policy_page.data_account: Account data: email and password (always stored encrypted, never in plain text).
privacy_policy_page.data_academic: Academic and enrollment data: programs taken, enrollment status, grades where applicable.
privacy_policy_page.data_commercial: Commercial data (if you contact us for information): source of contact, program of interest, and communication history, used internally in our CRM.
privacy_policy_page.data_technical: Minimal technical data: IP address and user agent in server security logs, and the session cookie while you are logged in.
privacy_policy_page.purpose_title: What we use your data for
privacy_policy_page.purpose_1: Managing your enrollment and giving you access to the learning platform.
privacy_policy_page.purpose_3: Managing the commercial relationship with prospective students (internal CRM).
privacy_policy_page.purpose_4: Complying with legal and contractual obligations arising from the educational service.
privacy_policy_page.purpose_5: Sending you communications about our programs, only if you have given explicit consent (email marketing).
privacy_policy_page.legalbasis_body: Performance of a contract (enrollment and delivery of the educational service), consent (marketing communications, non-essential cookies), and legitimate interest (service security, handling inquiries).
privacy_policy_page.retention_title: How long we keep your data
privacy_policy_page.retention_body: Student data is kept for the duration of the academic relationship and, after it ends, for the period required by applicable educational and tax regulations. Commercial contact data that does not convert to enrollment is kept for a maximum of 24 months from the last contact, unless you request earlier deletion.
privacy_policy_page.recipients_title: Who we share your data with
privacy_policy_page.recipients_body: We do not sell or share your data with third parties for purposes unrelated to our service. We may share data with technology providers strictly necessary to operate the platform (hosting, transactional email) under confidentiality and data processing agreements. Specifically, the contact form is sent via FormSubmit (formsubmit.co), a form-forwarding service that delivers your enquiry (first name, last name, email, country and message) to our mailbox and does not use it for any other purpose.
privacy_policy_page.security_body: Passwords are stored encrypted (bcrypt), communications travel encrypted (HTTPS/TLS), access to data is restricted by role, and we apply technical measures to protect against unauthorized access.
privacy_policy_page.rights_intro: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, object to, restrict the processing of, and request portability of your personal data. To exercise them, write to us at
privacy_policy_page.rights_outro: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority if you believe we have not handled your request correctly.
privacy_policy_page.minors_body: Our programs are aimed at adults. We do not knowingly collect data from anyone under 18.
privacy_policy_page.changes_body: We may update this policy to reflect legal or service changes. We will always publish the last-updated date at the top of this page.

legal_notice_page.title: Legal Notice
legal_notice_page.identity_body: UCLCampus (trading name). Legal entity name, registered address, tax ID, and registry details pending completion by the project owner before going live. Contact: info@uclcampus.com.
legal_notice_page.purpose_body: This site provides information about our educational programs, lets you request information, and gives enrolled students access to the learning platform (LMS).
legal_notice_page.ip_body: The content of this site (text, design, logos, code) is the property of UCLCampus or third parties who have authorized its use, unless stated otherwise. Reproduction without express authorization is prohibited.
legal_notice_page.liability_body: We work to keep the information published here accurate and up to date, but we do not guarantee it is free of errors. We reserve the right to modify the content of this site at any time.
legal_notice_page.law_body: This legal notice is governed by the applicable legislation on information society services and data protection in force in the territory where UCLCampus operates.

accessibility_page.title: Accessibility
accessibility_page.commitment_body: We work to make this site accessible to as many people as possible, regardless of ability or device, using the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) as our reference.
accessibility_page.status_body: This site is under active development. Some areas do not yet meet all accessibility criteria (for example, a full review of keyboard navigation and screen reader support in the student area). We will keep addressing these points progressively.
accessibility_page.contact_body: If you encounter an accessibility barrier while using this site, please write to us and we will look into it:

admissions.intro: The admission process is simple and fully online.

steps.title: Request information
steps.desc: Tell us which program interests you and we will answer your questions.

steps.title: Submit your application
steps.desc: Complete the admission form with your documentation.

steps.title: Complete your enrolment
steps.desc: Confirm your place and access the virtual campus.

transparency.intro: Consult the legal documentation and regulations governing UCLCampus.

about.intro_p1: UCL Campus Malta, accredited in 2023 by the MFHEA under licence number 2023-015, belongs to Universidad Cum Laude – UCL (an entity registered in the Principality of Andorra with company registry number 22937 and NRT L-718011-S), whose corporate purpose is the promotion, implementation, management and operation of higher-education studies and institutions, as well as the development of training and university-level education projects. A university-level institution teaching both on site and online, offering degree and postgraduate studies, both official and institution-specific.
about.intro_p2: Through its commercial brand Universae Cum Laude it offers official Bachelor's, Master's and Doctoral degrees valid throughout the European Higher Education Area (EHEA), the United Kingdom and all Commonwealth countries.

cards.title: Our mission
cards.desc: To close the gap between academic training and the reality of the labour market. We do not just provide higher education: we prepare professionals ready to add value from their first day in the company.

cards.title: Official status and legal backing
cards.desc: We operate with full recognition under the MFHEA framework (the Maltese counterpart of Spain's ANECA): all our qualifications are official and fully valid within the EHEA — the assurance of regulated, internationally recognised education.

cards.title: Degrees recognised in the UK and the Commonwealth
cards.desc: In addition to being official qualifications valid in the EHEA, they are also valid in the United Kingdom and in all Commonwealth member countries (Canada, Australia, New Zealand, etc.).

cards.title: Three-year degrees
cards.desc: Our bachelor's degrees take three years (180 ECTS credits) and are equivalent to Spanish four-year, 240-ECTS degrees.

about.essence_intro: What sets us apart is an educational model designed from the workplace into the classroom.

essence_items.title: Up-to-date content
essence_items.desc: Living, constantly evolving study plans that integrate the real needs companies demand at any given time.

essence_items.title: Practical approach
essence_items.desc: We replace static theory with active methodologies where students learn to solve real problems.

essence_items.title: Industry connection
essence_items.desc: Training based on projects, simulations and real cases that mirror the challenges professionals face every day.

about.talent_title: The value of talent and employability
about.talent_intro: We understand that an official qualification is, above all, a key to professional success. That is why our institution focuses on:

talent_items.title: Competence development
talent_items.desc: Beyond memorisation, we assess the ability to apply knowledge and contribute solutions.

talent_items.title: Talent engine
talent_items.desc: A meeting point between young talent and company demand, both in the Maltese ecosystem and internationally.

about.quality_text: At our institution, excellence is not a theoretical concept but the way we work. We guarantee a rigorous, transparent educational experience in which every program and every teacher is focused on strengthening our students' professional future and employability.

contact_form.intro: Questions, or want more information? Write to us and we will reply as soon as possible.
contact_form.name: First name
contact_form.success: Thank you! We have received your enquiry and will reply soon.
contact_form.error: Your message could not be sent. Please try again or email us at info@uclcampus.com.

offer.accreditation_notice: Please note that this programme is currently in the process of accreditation by the Malta Further and Higher Education Authority (MFHEA). If you wish to express your interest in enrolling in this educational programme, please contact us at info@uclcampus.com. The student agreement, which includes the payment of tuition and enrolment fees, will only be signed once the MFHEA approves the accreditation of this educational programme.
offer.stub_body: We are preparing the detailed information for this programme. You will soon find the syllabus, admission requirements and career paths here.
